pyspark_transformation:pyspark_transform.name: pyspark_transformation_Create_table_Create_a_full_denormalized_table_by_joining_all_model_
pyspark_transformation:pyspark_transform.request: Create table: Create a full denormalized table by joining all model tables. Base table: Sales. Join Product on Sales.ProductKey = Product.ProductKey. Join Region on Sales.SalesTerritoryKey = Region.SalesTerritoryKey. Join SalesPerson on Sales.EmployeeKey = SalesPerson.EmployeeKey. Join SalesPersonRegion on SalesPerson.EmployeeKey = SalesPersonRegion.EmployeeKey. Join Targets on SalesPerson.EmployeeID = Targets.EmployeeID. Select all columns and return one final table named Full_Model_Table.

sql_query:sql_query_create_table_create_.name: sql_query_Create_table_Create_a_full_denormalized_table_by_joining_all_model_tab
sql_query:sql_query_create_table_create_.request: Create table: Create a full denormalized table by joining all model tables. Base table: Sales. Join Product on Sales.ProductKey = Product.ProductKey. Join Region on Sales.SalesTerritoryKey = Region.SalesTerritoryKey. Join SalesPerson on Sales.EmployeeKey = SalesPerson.EmployeeKey. Join SalesPersonRegion on SalesPerson.EmployeeKey = SalesPersonRegion.EmployeeKey. Join Targets on SalesPerson.EmployeeID = Targets.EmployeeID. Select all columns and return one final table named Full_Model_Table.

sql_query:sql_query_create_a_full_denorm.name: sql_query_Create_a_full_denormalized_table_by_joining_all_model_tables_with_Sale
sql_query:sql_query_create_a_full_denorm.code:
SELECT t0.*
FROM Sales t0
LEFT JOIN Product t1 ON t0.ProductKey = t1.ProductKey
LEFT JOIN Region t2 ON t0.SalesTerritoryKey = t2.SalesTerritoryKey
LEFT JOIN SalesPerson t3 ON t0.EmployeeKey = t3.EmployeeKey
LEFT JOIN SalesPersonRegion t4 ON t3.EmployeeKey = t4.EmployeeKey
LEFT JOIN Targets t5 ON t3.EmployeeID = t5.EmployeeID;
sql_query:sql_query_create_a_full_denorm.request: Create a full denormalized table by joining all model tables with Sales as base table

pyspark_transformation:pyspark_transform.name: pyspark_transformation_Create_a_full_denormalized_table_by_joining_all_model_tables_with_S
pyspark_transformation:pyspark_transform.code:
result_df = Sales
result_df = result_df.join(Product, result_df['ProductKey'] == Product['ProductKey'], 'left')
result_df = result_df.join(Region, result_df['SalesTerritoryKey'] == Region['SalesTerritoryKey'], 'left')
result_df = result_df.join(SalesPerson, result_df['EmployeeKey'] == SalesPerson['EmployeeKey'], 'left')
result_df = result_df.join(SalesPersonRegion, result_df['EmployeeKey'] == SalesPersonRegion['EmployeeKey'], 'left')
result_df = result_df.join(Targets, result_df['EmployeeID'] == Targets['EmployeeID'], 'left')
result_df.createOrReplaceTempView('full_model_table')
pyspark_transformation:pyspark_transform.request: Create a full denormalized table by joining all model tables with Sales as base table

pyspark_transformation:pyspark_transform.name: pyspark_transformation_Create_a_full_denormalized_table_by_joining_all_model_tables_Base_t

result_df = result_df.join(Region, result_df['SalesTerritoryKey'] == Region['SalesTerritoryKey'], 'left')
result_df = result_df.join(SalesPerson, result_df['EmployeeKey'] == SalesPerson['EmployeeKey'], 'left')
result_df = result_df.join(SalesPersonRegion, result_df['EmployeeKey'] == SalesPersonRegion['EmployeeKey'], 'left')
result_df = result_df.join(Targets, result_df['EmployeeID'] == Targets['EmployeeID'], 'left')
result_df.createOrReplaceTempView('full_model_table')

pyspark_transformation:pyspark_transform.name: pyspark_transformation_create_full_denormalized_table_by_joining_all_tables
pyspark_transformation:pyspark_transform.code:
result_df = orders
result_df = result_df.join(customers, result_df['CustomerID'] == customers['CustomerID'], 'left')
result_df.createOrReplaceTempView('full_model_table')
